top_signals.title: Stocks Pare Losses as US Completes Iran Attack: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks pared their losses and oil trimmed its gain after the US military said it has completed its latest strikes in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could become bitcoin’s latest headwind
top_signals.summary: SpaceX setting aside up to 30% of IPO shares for retail investors could prompt investors to exit crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Is Said to Be Over Four Times Oversubscribed
top_signals.summary: SpaceX's initial public offering has attracted demand for more than four times the available shares, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg's Michael Hytha breaks down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Navy stands up naval support activity in Western Australia
top_signals.summary: As part of the AUKUS security pact, NSA Stirling will provide support for personnel assigned to Submarine Rotational Force-West.
